{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260323034412420FD8AFE00B4C22134B"}"},"total":2369},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7469181047285695294","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看，主角一个千年老骷髅，那种历经世事的稳重感和淡淡的死感写出来了。
和玩家那种热血沸腾鬼头鬼脑奇形怪状的作死感，搭配起来相得益彰。
人物很鲜明，配角塑造的也很好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1739063810,"group_id":"7395229639326583833","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5P7wJxWQxjwmy0qlxy4PTrnvB1rXqj4mMzLQXAVAVr3","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2483119977934444","user_name":"天卫的柏古兽"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2483119977934444","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7395229639326583833","book_info":{"abstract":"剑与魔法的恢弘表象下，是走向腐化的世界末途。
穿越西幻世界682年，叶知终于等到了他的金手指，一个连接蓝星网络的光团！
配上自己撞上门来的神格光球，一个连接蓝星和异界的游戏诞生了。
谁说不能顺着网线找人？
只需要一个感叹号，几枚游戏货币，沙雕玩家就能化身不知疲倦，不畏生死的第四天灾，为他开疆扩土！
科研玩家：学魔法太难了，快来和我一起加入机械进化大军，使用不用吟唱的瞬发子弹魔法吧！
献祭流玩家：诶，亡语魔法真好用！不就是用一次死一次嘛，爷最不缺的就是命！
召唤流玩家：你是想单挑我们一群人，还是我的契约兽群殴你一个？
剧情玩家：
领主大人，听说你同时在给三个国家做间谍，最近有没有兴趣发展新的下家，争当神明之下第一位四姓家奴？你问我怎么知道？这不是众所周知的事吗？喂，别跑啊！你还没回答我的问题呢！
甚至还有体验派玩家，偷偷在游戏中脱了单！
硬核玩家：不是哥们，你玩的游戏是哪个版本？我还以为玩神明之下烂命一条就是干呢【带上墨镜】
种地基建，战争争霸！
反正艾尔提亚大陆没救了，叶知当然是怎么大胆怎么来！
正好，他早就看这该死的世界不爽了！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/e2de19b424b6114542a17f85834f469a","author":"甜口火锅","author_id":"","book_id":"7395229639326583833","book_name":"世界没救了，不如引入第四天灾","book_short_name":"天灾养成指南","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"3.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":257,"name":"玄幻脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=257&name=玄幻脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":7,"name":"玄幻","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=7&name=玄幻&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":452,"name":"架空","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=452&name=架空&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":512,"name":"异世大陆","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=512&name=异世大陆&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":828,"name":"基建","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=828&name=基建&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":837,"name":"争霸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=837&name=争霸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":855,"name":"第四天灾","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=855&name=第四天灾&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7395229752568578585","read_count":"32886","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1743707"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.9","serial_count":"852","tags":"玄幻脑洞,玄幻,系统,穿越,架空,异世大陆,基建,争霸,第四天灾","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/5c857bdb918f93eaecd15763b2ae9d83~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779392652&x-signature=K0wy1GzviXPHSAlgNSKyw3UtD2k%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"}
